caption: A gray Dodge Challenger is showcased in an outdoor parking area near a grassy area with trees. The first frame provides a side profile of the car's front end, showing a sleek gray finish and a black wheel. A white truck with red text on its side is partially visible in the background. The scene shifts to a front-facing view of the car, highlighting its headlights, grille, and a small "Challenger" badge on the front. The view then moves to a close-up of the driver's side door handle. Finally, a hand is seen reaching inside the vehicle, touching a bright red seat. The car's interior features dark gray flooring and red upholstery. Throughout the sequence, the focus transitions from the car's exterior styling to its interior details.
